markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli and Adam Kuznia to explore a potential leadership role.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX.ai is a hyper-growth hybrid:** It combines an AI-driven platform with a high-touch service model, scaling from $0 to a $13M run rate in under a year.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**The core challenge is scaling the service model:** The 45-person delivery team is overwhelmed, creating a bottleneck for the sales team, which is closing $3M in its first three months.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Kuznia is a strong fit:** His background in building commercial functions and transitioning service-led businesses to software models directly addresses GrowthX.ai's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [**Next step is a working session:** A 1-hour deep dive will assess cultural fit and practical problem-solving alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai: Business Model & Growth

  - [**Origin:** Marcel Santilli's experience building successful internal publications at IBM and HP led to the insight that no agency could reliably deliver this model.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**Validation:** A $500 workshop on AI marketing workflows sold out (33 attendees), proving market demand.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**Growth Trajectory:**](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Revenue:** $13M run rate (from $3M this year); cashflow positive.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Funding:** Bootstrapped until March; now has $12M in the bank, including a small investment from HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Team:** 80 people, with 45 in delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [**Hybrid Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [**Service:** High-touch delivery with an 8-week strategy sprint and 14-month contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [**Platform:** A proprietary "Content OS" with a "workflows as code" framework (to be open-sourced as `Output.ai`).](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Financials:**](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [**Gross Margin:** \~70% (software-like).](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**ACV:** \~$184k, with average customer spend growing to \~$214k via upsells (e.g., adding programmatic content).](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
      - [**Sales Cycle:** 42 days.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

### The Scaling Challenge

  - [**Delivery Team Bottleneck:** The 45-person team lacks a leader and is struggling to scale, creating a constraint for the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Sales Team Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [**First AE:** Closed $3M in 3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Sales is limited by the delivery team's capacity for kickoffs (2 per week).](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [**Organizational Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**Past Model (Failed):** Pods led by Directors who excelled at strategy but not book-of-business management.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**Current Model:** Evolving to a shared-resource model with Directors, Engagement Managers, and Editors.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

### Adam Kuznia: Relevant Experience

  - [**Career Focus:** Leading commercial functions (sales, marketing, CS) and building end-to-end revenue machines.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Key Experiences:**](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Percolate:** Built a post-sales org for enterprise clients (Unilever, Anheuser-Busch).](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Datacamp:** Built a self-service machine as CRO.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [**Opal:** Combined enterprise and self-service models.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [**Sales Impact Academy:** Restructured a service business into a software company.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Invisible:** Currently leads post-sales, RevOps, and temporarily pre-sales.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Core Insight:** Incentive alignment is critical. Paying sales, CS, and marketing the same commission on new business and renewals eliminated internal conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

### Culture & Fit

  - [**Kuznia's Philosophy:** Prioritizes learning, fun, and success (aiming for 2/3 weekly) and values "fluidity" over rigid roles.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [**GrowthX.ai's Need:** A leader who can build a new organizational shape from scratch, not apply a cookie-cutter model.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [**Shared Goal:** Build a high-value, efficient company (e.g., $1B with 150-200 employees) that avoids the pitfalls of large, siloed organizations.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel Santilli:** Schedule a 1-hour working session with Adam Kuznia.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [**Adam Kuznia:** Participate in the deep-dive session.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [**Both:** Explore a paid consulting engagement as a low-risk trial if mutual confidence isn't high after the session.](https://fathom.video/share/vknnc8SHuVdbtsSxfko-xPTdNsUKaedV?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
